turns.user: Appetite off hai, meals bhi skip ho rahe hain.
turns.assistant: Lag raha hai normal day pehle se zyada effort le raha hai. Kya appetite zyada kam hui hai, zyada badhi hai, ya meals skip ya delay hone ki wajah se zyada irregular ho gayi hai? Ek recent example, ek timing detail, ya 0 se 10 ka quick estimate bhi enough hai.
